title: NQ Upper Liquidity Harvest Then Lower Relocation
focus_questions: Is the post-harvest state only balance, or is it becoming a deeper reversal?
Has the market already completed the objective and lost same-side efficiency?

summary.thesis: After upper liquidity is harvested, the next high-value read is whether the market is only balancing or starting a deeper lower relocation.
summary.operator_translation: Do not keep chasing the old direction once the objective is already done.
summary.ai_usage_note: Use this card after an upper objective completes and the replay shifts into post-harvest behavior.
summary.ai_brief: Environment: an upper objective is already complete and the market is entering post-harvest behavior. Required evidence: harvest completion, weaker same-side continuation, and either balance or lower search. Do not trade: by chasing the old move or forcing reversal before acceptance lower. Real trigger: post-harvest balance edge or lower-acceptance signal. Failure point: the market immediately resumes stronger same-side continuation.

when_relevant: An upper liquidity objective was already harvested.
Same-side continuation begins losing efficiency after that harvest.
Price starts balancing, pulling back, or searching lower.
required_evidence: harvest_completed or equivalent post-objective evidence exists
post_harvest_response is visible in the replay
continuation after the objective is weaker than the approach into it
confirmation_signals: the upper objective is actually harvested instead of only touched
same-side continuation loses efficiency after harvest
price begins balancing, pulling back, or searching lower from the harvested zone
invalidation_signals: the prior objective was never actually completed
same-side continuation resumes strongly with no meaningful post-harvest pause
the market never shows any distinct post-harvest behavior
no_trade_conditions: Do not chase continuation in the same direction after the objective is already complete and no new base has formed.
Do not force a reversal immediately after harvest if price has not yet accepted lower or broken balance.
Do not overread every pause after harvest as a major reversal when the market is only rotating narrowly.

entry_archetypes.name: post-harvest balance edge
entry_archetypes.description: Trade the edge of the first clear post-harvest balance once the objective is already complete.
entry_archetypes.risk_note: Avoid if balance has not actually formed and the market is still unstable.

entry_archetypes.name: lower-acceptance continuation
entry_archetypes.description: Shift short only after price proves lower acceptance following harvest completion.
entry_archetypes.risk_note: Avoid if price only pulls back briefly and reclaims the harvested zone.

management_notes: Separate balance, pullback, and true reversal instead of treating them as one state.
If price reclaims the harvested zone quickly, downgrade the reversal idea.
Use this card to decide whether the move is done, not to invent a new move too early.
review_questions: Was the upper objective truly complete before the operator changed bias?
Did the market shift into balance first, or immediately prove deeper reversal intent?
Was the trade idea a justified post-harvest read, or just late chasing after the move was done?
